calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
